description: Left side of an ornate ketubba fragment. Based on the names mentioned and David Ben-Naʿīm's signature, the dating is likely mid-nineteenth-century. Only the bride's first name Ḥanna is preserved and the groom's entire name is missing. There is a long addendum in Hebrew explaining ketubba-related payments that is signed by R. Yosef b. ___ al-Gazi. Requires further examination. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
